title: Slovakian Spicy Pepper Stir Fry
description: A spicy and savory stir fry dish from Slovakia, made with fresh peppers and a hint of velvety texture.
instructions: Heat the spicy oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, and stir-fry until fragrant.
Add the crumbled tofu and stir-fry until lightly browned.
Add the Slovakian peppers and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, or until tender.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar, and sugar, and add to the skillet.
Stir-fry for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the sauce is bubbly and slightly thickened.
Serve hot, garnished with sliced peppers if desired.
